differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to evaluate for NADPH oxidase deficiency (Chronic Granulomatous Disease)
Measure quantitative immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM) and lymphocyte subsets
Obtain targeted genetic testing for primary immunodeficiency (e.g., CYBB gene sequencing)
Perform PCR testing for Tropheryma whipplei on biopsy tissue
Review biopsy pathology for PAS-positive histiocytes
Continue targeted antimicrobial therapy based on current positive culture sensitivities while awaiting primary immunodeficiency workup

differential_diagnoses: Chronic Granulomatous Disease (CGD) (hypomorphic or adult-onset variant)
Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
Systemic sarcoidosis with secondary bacterial colonization
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to evaluate for NADPH oxidase deficiency
Measure quantitative immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM) and lymphocyte subsets
Send peripheral blood for genetic testing (targeted primary immunodeficiency panel or whole-exome sequencing)
Obtain PCR testing for Tropheryma whipplei and Leishmania on liver biopsy tissue
Conduct a comprehensive review of pathology slides by an expert hematopathologist and infectious disease pathologist
Consult Immunology and Infectious Disease for coordination of care
Maintain targeted antimicrobial therapy while avoiding empiric high-dose corticosteroids
